paper_title: Identification and Analysis of SIT Sequences in Diatoms

methods.description: This method involves verifying or extending gene models predicted to encode SITs by mapping transcriptome sequence reads from various diatom species to their respective genomes. The goal is to identify full-length transcribed SIT gene sequences.

steps.description: Mapped sequence reads originated from transcriptomes of triplicate cultures of each species grown in artificial seawater and harvested during specific growth phases.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch transcriptome sequence reads from NCBI GEO

steps.description: Reads were mapped to the diatom genomes using SEAStAR software.
steps.searchable_summary: map sequence reads to genomes using SEAStAR

steps.description: Determine transcript fold change of SIT sequences in nutrient starved relative to nutrient replete growth conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate transcript fold change using SEAStAR

steps.description: Extract and combine transcript read coverage for each SIT gene using SEAStAR tool ref_select.
steps.searchable_summary: extract read coverage using SEAStAR ref_select

steps.description: Visualize coverage of reads that mapped to each SIT sequence in R and compare to the gene model.

methods.description: This method identifies SIT homologs using search tools and databases, aligns sequences, and constructs a phylogenetic tree to understand evolutionary relationships.

steps.description: Use BLAST to search protein and translated nucleotide sequences from NCBI nonredundant databases.
Align sequences to the translated full-length SIT protein sequences using MAFFT.
Create a Hidden Markov Model (HMM) profile of the reference alignment using hmmbuild.
Identify homologous sequences in MMETSP using hmmsearch against predicted protein sequences.
Calculate a phylogenetic tree from the trimmed protein alignment using RAXML.

methods.method_name: Transcription of SITs in Mixed Field Communities
methods.description: This method involves collecting and processing samples from mixed plankton communities to analyze SIT transcription using metatranscriptome sequencing.

steps.description: Collect surface seawater samples at specified stations using a Lutz double diaphragm pump.
steps.searchable_summary: collect seawater samples using diaphragm pump

steps.description: Filter seawater through a 2 µm polycarbonate filter and quantify biogenic silica.
Extract RNA from cells on frozen filters using the Totally RNA extraction kit.
steps.searchable_summary: extract RNA using Totally RNA kit

steps.description: Convert amplified polyA-selected RNA to double-stranded cDNA.
Sequence cDNA libraries on Illumina MiSeq and HiSeq systems.
